description_long: This is a dark gray, single-engine military airplane with a streamlined fuselage and mid-mounted straight wings. The wings and tail surfaces display white cross insignias, and the tail features a red band with a black and white marking. The airplane has a single nose wheel and two main landing gear under the wings, all of which are fixed and visible. The cockpit is positioned forward of the wing root and is enclosed with a clear canopy. The engine is mounted beneath the fuselage, and the tail section is conventional with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
description: A dark gray, single-engine military airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, white cross insignias, and a red-banded tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the streamlined fuselage, mid-mounted wings, single nose wheel, and red-banded tail with insignia.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full wingspan, twin main landing gear, and the single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cockpit canopy, under-fuselage engine, and tail markings.
description_view_3: Front view showing the nose wheel, cockpit placement, and symmetrical wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible dihedral or winglets; conventional military design.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine mounted beneath the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main fixed gear under the wings.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
